title: coordinate.run task payload (v1 — M3: routed pipelines)
description: Input for the coordinator's coordinate.run skill. Routes: evaluate | migrate | generate+migrate | full-loop | auto (deterministic state-table routing; LLM planner upgrades 'auto' later). Any subset, any order — no mandatory start or end (PRD part-6).

goal.description: Which route to run; 'auto' infers from state: alreadyMigratedUrl→evaluate, sourceLocation→migrate→evaluate, topic→full loop.

targets.description: Evaluate route: pages to score. Each target × fanOut becomes one eval.run child.

fanOut.description: Repeat count per target — run-once vs run-10x is just this number (variance experiments).

alreadyMigratedUrl.description: Auto route hint: page already migrated → evaluate only

topic.description: Generative routes: what to synthesize. OPTIONAL — if omitted on a generate route, the coordinator asks content-gen (content.ideate) to pick one (agent-led daily loop). The chosen topic is written back into the run config.

lane.description: Editorial lane for agent-led topic ideation when 'topic' is omitted. Resolution: explicit lane > the target site's profile lane (e.g. wilderness-journal for adapt-to-2026-demo) > content-gen's own default.

pageSlug.description: Migration slug base; '-b{branch}' appended per branch

backend.description: Migration backend hint (dryrun | makecom | sdk | opencode)

requestedBy.description: SSO identity (email) of the human who triggered the run — set server-side by the dashboard from the Google session, stored as runs.user_email. Absent for CLI / edge-shim / mesh triggers (system runs).
